Briefly describe the feature.

Example: "Add an Executor layer for SELECT statement execution."

-->

<!--

Why is this feature needed?

Describe the problem or limitation this feature solves.

-->

<!--

Describe the proposed design at a high level.

Focus on responsibility separation and dependencies.

-->

<!--

Describe what is included in this issue.

<!--

Describe what should not be handled in this issue.

<!--

Add implementation ideas, affected modules, traits, structs, or APIs.

-->

-->

- [ ] Manual verification

Add links, references, related issues, or design notes.
